findings.description: Execution Bidder Details table structure corrupted: the BIDDER field, which spans the full width as a single cell in the PDF form, is split into three duplicate cells across three columns. The FAX NUMBER field is also duplicated across two columns in row 4.
findings.evidence: PDF page 6 shows 'BIDDER: HydroLogics, Inc.' as a single full-width field. HTML renders it as three cells all containing 'BIDDER: HydroLogics, Inc.' in the same row. Similarly, 'FAX NUMBER: 919-831-1295' appears once in the PDF but twice in row 4 of the HTML table (columns 2 and 3).

findings.description:
Task sub-section headings (Task 1 through Task 5) are visually distinct bold/underlined headings in the PDF Scope of Work, functioning as sub-sections under 'SCOPE OF WORK'. In the HTML, they are demoted to styled bold paragraphs (

) instead of heading elements (e.g., h3).
findings.evidence:
PDF pages 7-8 show 'Task 1: Update Model Inflow Data', 'Task 2: Update Cape Fear River Basin Model Components', 'Task 3: Update / Develop Combined Model Components', 'Task 4: Organize and Conduct Meetings', 'Task 5: Update Model Documentation and Update NCDENR Sever Files' as bold underlined section headings. HTML renders all five as '

Task N:...

' under the 'SCOPE OF WORK' h2.
